word: H72 - אֶבֶן הָעֵזֶר - ʼEben hâ-ʻÊzer - eh'-ben haw-e'-zer - Ebenezer

sections.paragraph:
Original: אבן העזר

Transliteration: 'eben hâ‛êzer

Phonetic: eh'-ben haw-e'-zer

BDB Definition:

Ebenezer = "stone of help"
  1. memorial stone erected by Samuel to mark where God helped Israel to defeat the Philistines - north of Jerusalem

Origin: from H68 and H5828 with the article inserted

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun
